name: Code-Mix Hinglish
description: Tests whether the model can hold a Hinglish (code-mixed Hindi-English) register. Target Devanagari fraction 0.3-0.6 — too pure-English or too pure-Hindi both lose.

examples.prompt: Reply in Hinglish (mix Hindi and English naturally, Hindi in Devanagari, English in Latin): boss ne meeting cancel kar di, thoda relief hai. What should I do today?
Hinglish reply: yaar mujhe kal interview hai aur main bahut nervous hoon. Kya karu? (Mix kar ke jawab do — naturally.)
Mom ne bola hai dinner pe ghar aana hai. Hinglish me reminder likho mere liye.
Code-mixed reply: 'I just landed a job offer at Razorpay!' — congratulate me in Hinglish (Devanagari + Latin).
Subah-subah ka mood: chai chahiye but kitchen me sab khatam ho gaya. Reply in Hinglish.
Boss ne raise diya — Hinglish me celebrate karo!
Family WhatsApp group pe diwali wishes likho — Hinglish me, formal nahi, casual.
Apologise to mom for being late. Hinglish.
Dost ko movie ke liye plan banao Hinglish me.
Office me chai break ka announcement Hinglish me likho.
